'''jonalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rhabdomyosarcomatous|rhabdomyosarcomatous]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-n-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rhabdomyosarcomatous|rhabdomyosarcomatous]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jonalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jonalithi|jonalithi]] || [[word:jonaliji|jonaliji]] || [[word:jonalishi|jonalishi]] || [[word:jonaliki|jonaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jonaluthuthu|jonaluthuthu]] || [[word:jonalujuju|jonalujuju]] || [[word:jonalushushu|jonalushushu]] || [[word:jonalukuku|jonalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jonaluthu|jonaluthu]] || [[word:jonaluju|jonaluju]] || [[word:jonalushu|jonalushu]] || [[word:jonaluku|jonaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jonalufthuf|jonalufthuf]] || [[word:jonalufjuf|jonalufjuf]] || [[word:jonalufshuf|jonalufshuf]] || [[word:jonalufkuf|jonalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jonalethe|jonalethe]] || [[word:jonaleje|jonaleje]] || [[word:jonaleshe|jonaleshe]] || [[word:jonaleke|jonaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jonalothotho|jonalothotho]] || [[word:jonalojojo|jonalojojo]] || [[word:jonaloshosho|jonaloshosho]] || [[word:jonalokoko|jonalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jonalotho|jonalotho]] || [[word:jonalojo|jonalojo]] || [[word:jonalosho|jonalosho]] || [[word:jonaloko|jonaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jonalofthof|jonalofthof]] || [[word:jonalofjof|jonalofjof]] || [[word:jonalofshof|jonalofshof]] || [[word:jonalofkof|jonalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfthĂŻf|jonalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfjĂŻf|jonalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfshĂŻf|jonalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfkĂŻf|jonalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|jonalĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|jonalĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|jonalĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|jonalĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfthĂŻf|jonalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfjĂŻf|jonalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfshĂŻf|jonalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfkĂŻf|jonalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfthĂŻf|jonalĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfjĂŻf|jonalĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfshĂŻf|jonalĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jonalĂŻfkĂŻf|jonalĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jonalĂŠthĂŠ|jonalĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jonalĂŠjĂŠ|jonalĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jonalĂŠshĂŠ|jonalĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jonalĂŠkĂŠ|jonalĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jonalathatha|jonalathatha]] || [[word:jonalajaja|jonalajaja]] || [[word:jonalashasha|jonalashasha]] || [[word:jonalakaka|jonalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jonalatha|jonalatha]] || [[word:jonalaja|jonalaja]] || [[word:jonalasha|jonalasha]] || [[word:jonalaka|jonalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jonalafthaf|jonalafthaf]] || [[word:jonalafjaf|jonalafjaf]] || [[word:jonalafshaf|jonalafshaf]] || [[word:jonalafkaf|jonalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jonalasha|jonalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jonalshĂ«sha|jonalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jonalrosha|jonalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jonalmusha|jonalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jonalyasha|jonalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojonalnkshĂ«sha|gojonalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojonalnkrosha|gojonalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojonalnkmusha|gojonalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojonalnkyasha|gojonalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jonanalasha|jonanalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jonanalshĂ«sha|jonanalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jonanalrosha|jonanalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jonanalmusha|jonanalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jonanalyasha|jonanalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojonanalnkshĂ«sha|gojonanalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojonanalnkrosha|gojonanalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojonanalnkmusha|gojonanalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojonanalnkyasha|gojonanalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jenĂŠlasha|jenĂŠlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jenĂŠlshĂ«sha|jenĂŠlshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jenĂŠlrosha|jenĂŠlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jenĂŠlmusha|jenĂŠlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jenĂŠlyasha|jenĂŠlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojenĂŠlnkshĂ«sha|gojenĂŠlnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojenĂŠlnkrosha|gojenĂŠlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojenĂŠlnkmusha|gojenĂŠlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojenĂŠlnkyasha|gojenĂŠlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jonfalasha|jonfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jonfalshĂ«sha|jonfalshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jonfalrosha|jonfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jonfalmusha|jonfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jonfalyasha|jonfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojonfalnkshĂ«sha|gojonfalnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojonfalnkrosha|gojonfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojonfalnkmusha|gojonfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojonfalnkyasha|gojonfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
